summary: Mage Hand disappeared.
game_context: The player sees a text notification on screen that their summoned Mage Hand has expired or been destroyed.
verbal_quote: Mage Hand disappeared.

summary: And... fire wine barrel.
game_context: The player identifies a flammable barrel in the ruins while looking for loot.
verbal_quote: And... fire wine barrel.

summary: Oh, I need to remember to remove that companion app off of Twitch because it doesn't work with...
game_context: Mentioning stream maintenance while looting.
verbal_quote: Oh, I need to remember to remove that companion app off of Twitch because it doesn't work with...

summary: Wait, what am I missing?
game_context: Rotating camera and searching the room for missed loot.
evidence: Actionable: In dense, multi-layered environments, players may feel they are missing items; ensure search-highlighting (e.g., holding Alt) is sufficiently intuitive or that level geometry doesn't occlude obvious chests.
verbal_quote: Wait, what am I missing?

summary: I think we were going back to the Myconid colony so we can speak to the... let them know that we dorked the Duergar.
game_context: Consulting the map to determine the next objective.
verbal_quote: I think we were going back to the Myconid colony so we can speak to the... let them know that we dorked the Duergar.

summary: Who? Lurgan? Oh, he's still around.
game_context: A teammate mentions they found and engaged a leftover enemy.
verbal_quote: Who? Lurgan? Oh, he's still around.

summary: I didn't realize he actually aggroed, I thought he didn't know what went on down there.
game_context: Discussing why Lurgan (NPC) attacked the party teammate.
evidence: Actionable: Clarify NPC faction logic so players understand which individuals remain hostile after a group battle, especially if they are physically separated by terrain.
verbal_quote: I didn't realize he actually aggroed, I thought he didn't know what went on down there.

summary: Actually, this armor... the Studded Leather Armor is actually really good.
game_context: Reviewing the stats of the Drow Studded Leather Armor in the inventory.
verbal_quote: Actually, this armor... the Studded Leather Armor is actually really good.

summary: I'm just finishing looting out this little camp that you left behind when you went to go loot that stuff up there.
game_context: Explaining her delay to the teammate while scavenging.
verbal_quote: I'm just finishing looting out this little camp that you left behind when you went to go loot that stuff up there.

summary: That's okay, finishing looting out this little camp that you left behind when you went to go loot that stuff up there.
game_context: Alice explains why she is trailing behind her teammates as she systematically loots the area.
verbal_quote: That's okay, finishing looting out this little camp that you left behind when you went to go loot that stuff up there.

summary: No, he always doesn't come down for the fight. He doesn't come down for the fight. I thought he left. But I never knew he stayed up here. I thought he left.
game_context: Alice comments on the inconsistent behavior of an NPC ally (Lurgan/Corvus) who failed to join a previous combat encounter.
evidence: Actionable: NPC allies should have consistent engagement triggers for nearby combat to avoid player confusion when they fail to participate.
verbal_quote: No, he always doesn't come down for the fight. He doesn't come down for the fight. I thought he left. But I never knew he stayed up here. I thought he left.

summary: That's why I like having... being a caster that knows, um, Ray of Frost as a cantrip. Because you can just put all the fire out.
game_context: Alice expresses satisfaction with the utility of her spells for interacting with the environment (extinguishing firewine barrels).
evidence: Actionable: Players highly value spells and cantrips with non-combat environmental utility; consider expanding these types of interactive elements.
verbal_quote: That's why I like having... being a caster that knows, um, Ray of Frost as a cantrip. Because you can just put all the fire out.

summary: Maybe I should stop selling all your water bottles too.
game_context: Alice jokes with her teammate about their habit of selling utility items that could be used for specific narrative/gameplay goals.
verbal_quote: Maybe I should stop selling all your water bottles too.

summary: Actually he has those... the Boots of Stormy Clamour... oh what?
game_context: The player is browsing Omeluum's trade inventory and discovers high-quality gear.
verbal_quote: Actually he has those... the Boots of Stormy Clamour... oh what?

summary: Wait, he has those? Yes! I bought them.
game_context: The player confirms the purchase of rare equipment they were likely seeking or surprised to find at a vendor.
verbal_quote: Wait, he has those? Yes! I bought them.

summary: Because Wyll needed boots... Granted they would work good on Karlach too.
game_context: Equipping the newly purchased boots on Wyll and considering which party member benefits most.
verbal_quote: Because Wyll needed boots... Granted they would work good on Karlach too.

summary: Wait he has those? Yes! I bought them.
game_context: Double-checking the inventory to confirm the purchase of the rare boots.
verbal_quote: Wait he has those? Yes! I bought them.

summary: Oh no, I do not have enough gold on me.
game_context: The 'Insufficient Gold' popup appears while trying to purchase multiple Potions of Greater Healing from Derryth.
evidence: Actionable: Consider adding a 'Current Balance vs. Transaction Cost' preview in the trade window to help players avoid selecting more items than they can afford before attempting to confirm.
verbal_quote: Oh no, I do not have enough gold on me.

summary: There we go, I'm broke now.
game_context: Finalizing the trade with Derryth and seeing the party's gold drop to near zero.
verbal_quote: There we go, I'm broke now.

summary: I have slain the creature called Glub-a-glub-a-glub...
game_context: Moving through the Grotto and interacting with a dead creature or environmental asset.
verbal_quote: I have slain the creature called Glub-a-glub-a-glub...
